title: DB Music
description: This resource pack brings together Western and Dragon Ball music for a fresh Minecraft experience.
body:
DB Music is a work-in-progress resource pack that adds a unique musical twist to Minecraft. It features a mix of iconic Dragon Ball Japanese BGM and a selection of random Western songs.

### **SONGS**

Here is the list **organized by numbering**:

---

1. **a_familiar_room** | I Still Can’t Sleep  
2. **aerie** | Gerudo Valley  
3. **an_ordinary_day** | L’Arena  
4. **ancestry** | Oh, Horror of Horrors!  
5. **axolot1** | Goku Fights Fearlessly  
6. **boss** | Tao Pai Pai - Kaioken x20  
7. **bromeliad** | A Love Encounter Part I  
8. **calm1** | Bajo el Cielo Azul  
9. **calm2** | A Love Encounter Part II  
10. **calm3** | Pilaf and His Henchmen  
11. **chrysopeoia** | The Devil Itself  
12. **comforting_memories** | Romance te Puedo Dar  
13. **credits** | Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku  
14. **crescent_dunes** | Tsuki Sayu Yoru  
15. **dragon_fish** | High-Noon Hoopla  
16. **echo_in_the_window** | The Green Leaves of Summer  
17. **end** | M1914  
18. **firebugs** | Kuririn Arrives by Boat  
19. **floating_dream** | LIKE HIM  
20. **hal1** | Wind of Sentiment  
21. **hal2** | Vegeta’s Sacrifice  
22. **hal3** | The Sneak-and-Strut  
23. **hal4** | My Way  
24. **infinite_amethyst** | Makafushigi Adventure  
25. **labyrinthine** | Bridge Collection  
26. **left_to_bloom** | Roselita  
27. **menu1** | Un Amico  
28. **menu2** | Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku  
29. **menu3** | Title Theme - Ocarina of Time  
30. **menu4** | The Trio (The Good, The Bad, and The Ugly)  
31. **nether1** | The Cell Game Part 3  
32. **nether2** | M1114 (Stereo Remix)  
33. **nether3** | M1308  
34. **nether4** | Battle Which Summons Death  
35. **nuance1** | Floral Fury  
36. **nuance2** | Entre Dos Aguas  
37. **one_more_day** | Vegeta’s Theme  
38. **piano1** | Living Under a Tyrant  
39. **piano2** | Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku  
40. **rubedo** | Shen Long No Densetsu  
41. **shunjii** | Enemy  
42. **so_below** | DBGT Creepy

---

Let me know if you need any changes!
